name: Low-Fat Glazed Chicken in Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 8:00
Garlic is optional.
1. In a bowl, combine the thawed orange juice concentrate (not regular orange juice) with marjoram, garlic powder, and nutmeg.
2. Split the chicken breasts into six serving sizes. Dip each piece into the orange juice mixture to coat completely. Place in the crockpot.
3. Pour the remaining orange juice mixture over the chicken.
4. Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours, or cook on high for 4 hours if desired. Precise cooking time is not important in crockpot cooking.
5. When the chicken is done, remove it to a serving platter. Pour the sauce remaining in the crockpot into a saucepan.
6. Mix cornstarch and water in a separate bowl. Stir this mixture into the juice in the saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly until thick and bubbly.
7. Serve the sauce over the chicken.
